Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW BARON, TEL. NO. 989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC., A CORPORATION'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment, There being no opposition to the application, the application is granted. See Code Civ. Proc. 484.060(a). A right to attach order and a writ of attachment will issue in the form to be provided by the moving party. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Protem Judge: Jim Weixel, Not reported.
